features: Special Design: Metal pin tail comb with non-skid paddle.Extra-long metal pin tail.Comfortable handle slide-proof to hold. Good combination for all hair types and lengths.Narrow teeth maintain moisture for shine and softness

Features: Create any style you like with the TONGTLETECH Tail Comb.For sectioning & styling.These Tail Combs are the perfect tools for setting hair and creating professional styles for all hair types in short to medium hair lengths

Heat-resistant & Anti-static: Combs made of carbon offer a variety of benefits-they're lightweight, durable and can withstand extreme heat.carbon is static free, which helps prevent fly-away and frizzy hair during styling
Use Effects: Metal pin combs will not break during regular use,adds brilliant shine to dull hair.Leaves hair smooth and silky soft.Suitable for salon, barber and cosmetic supply kits
